'''Dicken''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as an officer in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. He was stationed aboard the Imperial [[Prison/Legends|prison]] ship ''[[True Justice]]'' as the vessel's [[Executive officer/Legends|first officer]], serving under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tran]].

{{Char-stub}}
